summary: Frontend testing of VenuLock landing page hero refinement. ALL CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS PASS. Hero simplified to City toggle + single dropdown + solid gold CTA. Mobile CTA above fold at 435px (requirement: <844px).

mobile_cta_above_fold.details: CTA button bottom at 435.7px is well above fold (844px). CRITICAL requirement met.

search_toggle_city_nearme.details: Toggle shows 'City' and 'Near Me' options correctly.

city_mode_single_dropdown.details: City mode shows ONLY city dropdown with label 'Where are you celebrating?'

city_mode_no_event_type.details: Event Type dropdown is NOT visible in hero (moved to results page).

city_mode_no_guest_count.details: Guest Count dropdown is NOT visible in hero (moved to results page).

city_mode_no_advanced_filters.details: Advanced Filters is NOT visible in hero (moved to results page).

city_selection_navigation.details: Selecting Mumbai → CTA navigates to /venues/search?city=Mumbai (no event_type or guests params).

nearme_mode_message.details: Near Me mode shows message 'Use your current location to discover venues around you.'

nearme_use_my_location_button.details: 'Use My Location' button (data-testid='get-location-btn') is visible and clickable.

nearme_cta_text_change.details: CTA text changes from 'Find My Perfect Venue' to 'Find Venues Near Me' when location is detected.

cta_solid_gold_color.details: CTA button has solid gold background rgb(207, 164, 58) = #CFA43A.

cta_no_shimmer.details: CTA button has NO shimmer/gradient animation (animation: none).

cta_has_shadow.details: CTA button has subtle shadow via class shadow-[0_4px_16px_rgba(207,164,58,0.30)].

cta_microcopy.details: Microcopy 'Free venue matching. No booking fees.' is visible with data-testid='cta-microcopy'.

desktop_tagline_visible.details: Hero tagline 'Find. Compare. Lock.' is visible on desktop.

desktop_subtitle_visible.details: Hero subtitle paragraph is visible on desktop.

desktop_trust_line_visible.details: Trust line 'Trusted by 1,800+ events' is visible on desktop.

mobile_tagline_hidden.details: Hero tagline is HIDDEN on mobile (390x844).

mobile_subtitle_hidden.details: Hero subtitle is HIDDEN on mobile (390x844).

mobile_trust_line_hidden.details: Trust line is HIDDEN on mobile (390x844).

search_card_max_width.details: Search card width is 472px, within max-width of 520px.

header_navigation_discover.details: Discover link visible and navigates to /venues/search.

header_navigation_signin.details: Sign In link visible with data-testid='login-btn'.

header_navigation_get_started.details: Get Started button visible with data-testid='get-started-btn'.

sections_how_it_works.details: How it works section renders correctly.

sections_why_choose_us.details: Why choose us section renders correctly.

test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero section has been simplified: City toggle, single city dropdown, solid gold CTA (#CFA43A). Event Type, Guest Count, and Advanced Filters removed from hero (now only on results page). Search URL params only include city or lat/lng/radius - no event_type or guests. CTA is 408px above fold on mobile. All responsive hiding classes working correctly.
